creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg-status.freebsd.org links to individual builders via poudriere icon (smoking powder keg) or new_failed logs many of which are IPv6-only. portsfallout.com and pkg-fallout@ mail already rewrite links like the following:

http://beefy16.nyi.freebsd.org/
to
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/

As a workaround IPv4 users can set up a tunnel (e.g., stf(4)) or proxy (e.g., security/tor) but http:// (unencrypted) links are subject to eavesdropping or tampering (e.g., to exploit JS vulnerabilities in browsers) by the tunnel/proxy provider.
